title: draba reptans var. stellifera
intro: Draba reptans var. stellifera, also known as creeping draba, is a perennial plant belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae) and is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of creeping draba include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves for topical and internal use.
